Hand-pleated dough (20+ pleats)
Beef and pork seasoned with spices
Pan-fried until golden
Fresh herbs and garlic-yogurt sauce on the side

h2Sections.heading: How it's served at Yerevan Sac
contentBullets: Same as boiled: lift by the knot, bite the side, sip the broth, eat the rest. The crisp bottom is the bonus.
Served at our Carmichael location, 7600 Fair Oaks Blvd
Available for dine-in; ask about takeout availability
Price range: $3.50 - $4.50 per piece
